canonical.title: Automated media tracking for an Obsidian workflow (2026)

parent.title: Upgrading a personal Obsidian workflow in 2026

siblings.title: Low-friction capture & AI-assisted backfill
siblings.summary: How to lower capture friction across desktop, mobile, web, voice — and how to run AI tag/metadata backfill across an existing vault in 2026.

siblings.title: Frontmatter & tagging schemas for extraction
siblings.summary: How to design Obsidian YAML frontmatter and tag taxonomies in 2026 so external tools can reliably extract, query, and validate the metadata.

siblings.title: Knowledge-base patterns for a technical vault
siblings.summary: What actually works for a technical Obsidian vault in 2026: hybrid PARA+Zettel skeleton, Properties-first metadata, daily-note capture, MOCs over deep folders, and a small high-value plugin set.

siblings.title: Selective publishing to GitHub Pages or equivalents
siblings.summary: Pick the opt-in (whitelist) frontmatter pattern over draft-style opt-out; Quartz + ExplicitPublish is the closest free match to Obsidian Publish.

siblings.title: AI plugins for in-vault retrieval & summarization
siblings.summary: Pick Smart Connections for local-first retrieval, Copilot for polished vault chat with optional Plus tier, Smart Composer for Cursor-style edits, Khoj for cross-device self-hosted second-brain. Text Generator and the small ai-summary plugins cover dedicated summarization.

sources.title: obsidian-media-db-plugin
sources.claim: Obsidian Media DB plugin queries multiple APIs (TMDB, OMDb, Open Library, Jikan, Steam, MusicBrainz, etc.) for movies, series, anime, manga, books, comics, games, music and wiki articles into Obsidian.

sources.title: obsidian-book-search-plugin
sources.claim: Obsidian Book Search plugin uses Google Books API to auto-create book notes with full metadata; integrates with Templater.

sources.title: obsidianstats.com — Book Search
sources.claim: Book Search inserts a note in your vault with metadata pre-populated from Google Books and is compatible with Templater.

sources.title: Simkl vs Trakt
sources.claim: SIMKL offers unlimited free watchlist tracking with browser-based auto-scrobbling for Netflix/Hulu/Crunchyroll/Plex/Kodi/Jellyfin; Trakt's free tier was capped at 100 watchlist+collection items in 2026.

sources.title: wako — Trakt alternatives
sources.claim: Simkl is the most comprehensive all-purpose Trakt replacement with automatic logging across TV/movies/anime; Letterboxd remains the leading film community; Serializd is the Letterboxd-for-TV.

sources.title: CrossWatch
sources.claim: CrossWatch is a self-hosted sync engine that keeps Plex/Jellyfin/Emby in sync with SIMKL/Trakt/AniList/MDBList/Tautulli; runs locally with web UI.

sources.title: cenodude/CrossWatch
sources.claim: CrossWatch v0.9.18 (Apr 2026) replaces legacy webhooks with the Watcher feature; Docker deploy via ghcr.io/cenodude/crosswatch.

sources.title: Fleker/letterboxd-for-obsidian
sources.claim: Letterboxd Diary RSS Sync plugin uses Letterboxd's public RSS to fetch the last 50 diary entries into a single Letterboxd Diary.md note in Obsidian.

sources.title: Hardcover API docs
sources.claim: Hardcover exposes a free GraphQL API at api.hardcover.app/v1/graphql; tokens issued from account settings; intended for backend use, not browsers.

sources.title: Emma Goto — Hardcover API
sources.claim: Hardcover's GraphQL API is positioned as a Goodreads API alternative; can update reading status and lists programmatically.

sources.title: StoryGraph roadmap — API
sources.claim: StoryGraph has no public API as of 2026; the team is solo-developer and the API is not prioritised.

sources.title: StoryGraph — CSV export
sources.claim: StoryGraph supports CSV/Excel export from Manage Account → Manage Your Data → Export StoryGraph Library.

sources.title: storygraph-api (PyPI)
sources.claim: Unofficial Python package storygraph-api scrapes the StoryGraph site to expose data programmatically.

sources.title: Hardcover vs StoryGraph
sources.claim: Hardcover focuses on community + clean design; StoryGraph leads on data-driven mood-based recommendations and detailed reading stats.

sources.title: Readwise → Obsidian docs
sources.claim: Official Readwise → Obsidian plugin auto-exports highlights from Kindle, Apple Books, Google Play Books, Instapaper, Pocket, Medium, Twitter, PDFs into vault notes.

sources.title: readwiseio/obsidian-readwise
sources.claim: Official Readwise plugin for Obsidian; can sync on-open or on a 1/12/24-hour schedule.

sources.title: Readwise pricing
sources.claim: Readwise Full plan is $9.99/mo billed annually ($12.99 monthly); includes Obsidian export, Reader, and the highlight stack; 30-day trial, no free tier.

sources.title: obsidianstats.com — Media DB
sources.claim: Media DB plugin's free APIs include Open Library, Jikan, MusicBrainz, Steam, Wikipedia, VNDB; OMDb/TMDB/Comic Vine require free keys; Moby Games key is paid as of Sep 2024.

sources.title: Shreshth-mehra/Obsidian-TV-Tracker
sources.claim: Obsidian-TV-Tracker is a community plugin that pulls TMDB metadata into a grid View, storing each title as a YAML markdown file.

sources.title: chhoumann/quickadd
sources.claim: QuickAdd plugin chains user scripts (e.g. BookFinder.js) into multi-step macros that run from a single hotkey.

sources.title: QuickAdd — Book Finder macro
sources.claim: QuickAdd documentation ships a Book Finder macro example: user script + macro choice for one-keystroke book lookup.

sources.title: caronchen/obsidian-calibre-plugin
sources.claim: Obsidian Calibre plugin lets you browse a Calibre Content Server library and read books inside Obsidian; last pushed 2023.

sources.title: Trakt forums — Plex webhook
sources.claim: Trakt's Plex webhook (a VIP/paid feature) auto-scrobbles plays, ratings and library adds from Plex Pass servers.

sources.title: Simkl Jellyfin add-on
sources.claim: Simkl's free Jellyfin add-on pings the Simkl API once a configured watch-percentage is hit (e.g. 70%).

sources.title: wako — best movie tracking app
sources.claim: wako is the only mobile app that supports both Trakt and SIMKL backends; SeriesGuide is Android-only with Trakt-only sync.

sources.title: yourbookfriend.com — 2026 reading apps
sources.claim: Hardcover and StoryGraph are the dominant Goodreads alternatives in 2026; Goodreads is widely viewed as stagnant.

sources.title: dsebastien.net — best Obsidian plugins 2026
sources.claim: Dataview + Templater + QuickAdd remain the canonical 2026 Obsidian automation trio for building dashboards over media notes.

sources.title: christt105/media-tracker-obsidian-template
sources.claim: Reference vault template that pre-wires Movie Search + Templater + QuickAdd into a working media tracker.

sources.title: gazpachoking/trex
sources.claim: trex (Plex→Trakt scrobbler) is unmaintained — last push January 2019 — leaving Trakt-VIP webhooks or CrossWatch as the active Plex paths.

sources.title: achriom.com — best TV tracking apps
sources.claim: Serializd is positioned as 'Letterboxd for TV'; TV Time leans on social/community; cross-media trackers like Achriom group films, books, games together.
